President Trump took the first step by cutting off FHA access for non-permanent residents, but an administrative action can be reversed on day one by the next Democrat president.

My bill makes it permanent.

My Homeownership Eligibility Reform Act locks it into statute — taxpayer-backed mortgages through FHA, Fannie Mae, and Freddie Mac for U.S. citizens only, permanently.

The American Dream belongs to Americans. It’s time Washington started governing like it.

The results speak for themselves.

The average first-time homebuyer is now 40 years old, a record high. Home prices relative to income have nearly doubled since 1976. 

Americans aren’t living the American Dream. They’re being priced out of it.

I just introduced a bill to restrict taxpayer-backed mortgages to U.S. citizens only.

The sole purpose of our housing programs is to help Americans build wealth and achieve the American Dream. Illegal immigration is making that impossible. https://t.co/tksavSohli
